query GetCloudAccounts {

graphql.query:
query list_k8_issues_data($limit:Int, $offset:Int) {
   events: events_v2(where: {account_id:{_eq:"a2a30b02-0f67-42e5-a2ab-c658230fd798"},aggregation_key:{_eq:"ApplicationAPIFailures"},_and:[{created_at:{_gte:"2025-10-06T07:58:54.494Z"}},{created_at:{_lte:"2025-10-07T07:58:54.494Z"}}]}, order_by: [{column: "starts_at", order: desc}], limit: $limit, offset: $offset) {
     rows{
       account_id
       subject_type
       subject_name
       subject_namespace
       starts_at
       title
       finding_type
       cluster
       labels
       status
       aggregation_key
       priority
       id
       resource_id
       finding_id
       fingerprint
       subject_owner
     }
   }
 }

graphql.query:
query k8s_nodes_list($limit:Int, $offset:Int) {
  k8s_nodes(where: {cloud_account_id:{_eq:"a2a30b02-0f67-42e5-a2ab-c658230fd798"},_or:[{is_active:{_eq:true}},{is_active:{_is_null:true}}]}, limit: $limit, offset: $offset, order_by:{node_creation_time: desc_nulls_last}){
    name
    is_active
    node_creation_time
    updated_at
    conditions
    node_type
    node_flavor
    node_region
    node_zone
    memory_capacity
    cpu_capacity
    memory_allocatable
    cpu_allocatable
    memory_limits
    cpu_limits
    cloud_resource_id
    external_ip
    internal_ip
    labels
    taints
    cost
    meta
  }
  k8s_nodes_aggregate(where: {cloud_account_id:{_eq:"a2a30b02-0f67-42e5-a2ab-c658230fd798"},_or:[{is_active:{_eq:true}},{is_active:{_is_null:true}}]}) {
    aggregate {
      count
    }
  }
}

graphql.query:
query GetLlmConversation {
          llm_conversations(where: {account_id:{_eq:"{{account_id}}"},session_id:{_eq:"{{session_id}}"}}){
            id
            session_id
            account_id
            created_at
            updated_at
            source
            context
            status
            user_id
            user {
              display_name
            }
            title
            llm_conversation_messages(where:{message_type:{_in:["generation","followup"]}}, order_by:{created_at: asc}){
              id
              user {
                display_name
              }
              created_at
              updated_at
              message
              message_type
              response
              role
              status
              parent_agent_id
              message_config
              ack_message
              llm_conversation_agents(order_by:{created_at:asc}){
                id
                agent_name
                response
                created_at
                updated_at
                query
                thought
                parent_agent_id
                status
                response_summary
                llm_conversation_tool_calls(order_by:{created_at:asc}){
                  tool_name
                  parameters
                  response
                  created_at
                  updated_at
                  thought
                  tool_type
                  child_agent_id
                  agent_id
                  references
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
